case_title: FEDERAL NATIONAL MORTGAGE ASSOCIATION VS. JUNELYN POBRE et al

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF FEDERAL NATIONAL MORTGAGE ASSOCIATION

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FEDERAL NATIONAL MORTGAGE ASSOCIATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT POBRE, JUNELYN ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1425 KANSAS STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94107-3243, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT AND PREJUDGMENT CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF FEDERAL NATIONAL MORTGAGE ASSOCIATION SERVED APR-16-2010, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT POBRE, JUNELYN
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT POBRE, JUNELYN ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT POBRE, JUNELYN ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS
